creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)

3.6 has been released almost 6 months ago.
I'm not sure if related policy exists, but simple logic says port breakage (which, again, can be easily prevented) three times in a row and four times total with the exact same reason is simply not right. I'd probably integrate patch after first, maximum second failure.
